title: limonium brassicifolium subsp. macropterum
intro: Limonium brassicifolium subsp. macropterum, also known as Sea Lavender, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Sea Lavender include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing anxiety, and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of Sea Lavender include infusions, teas, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
